summary: Boxy, bass‑poor audience recording of a great show.
review: The reviewer describes the performance as a great show despite only being able to listen to a small portion. The AUD source is noted as very boxy and lacking low‑end, which limits the listening experience but doesn’t detract from the overall enjoyment of the music.

ai_rating.rationale: Review praises the show as great (high musical value) while calling out noticeable recording flaws (boxy, bassless). Weighted blend of strong show quality and fair recording quality yields a solid above‑average rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Boxy sound with missing low frequencies; overall clarity limited, but audible enough to recognize the performance.
